title: Notholcus mollis
taxonomy: Notholcus mollis is a species of beetle in the family Passalidae. It is a type of scaly-footed beetle. The classification of Notholcus mollis is as follows: Kingdom: Animalia, Phylum: Arthropoda, Class: Insecta, Order: Coleoptera, Family: Passalidae, Genus: Notholcus, Species: N. mollis. Notholcus mollis is a member of the genus Notholcus, which includes several other species of scaly-footed beetles. Further classification and information on this species are available in scientific literature and databases.

The beetle's secretions may contain compounds with antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Further investigation is necessary to fully understand the potential medicinal uses of Notholcus mollis.
